description: You are working for the Marketing Director to simplify customer segments in Oracle Analytics Desktop using the 'Sample Order Lines' dataset (C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\OracleAnalyticsData\sample_order_lines2023.xlsx). Create a custom group on the 'Customer Segment' column named 'Business Type' where 'Corporate' and 'Home Office' are grouped as 'Commercial' and 'Consumer' remains 'Consumer'. Visualize the results in a Donut Chart titled 'Revenue by Business Type' using 'Business Type' for the categories and 'Revenue' for the values. Save the workbook as 'Segment_Grouping_Analysis'.
